title: Partially Exposed Blob Feature
description: Generates a blob of the specified block with the specified dimensions. For the most part the blob is embedded in the specified surface, however a single side is allowed to be exposed.

partially_exposed_blob_feature_definitio.title: Partially Exposed Blob Feature Definition
partially_exposed_blob_feature_definitio.description: A single Partially Exposed Blob Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

places_block.description: Reference to the block to be placed.

placement_radius_around_floor.description: Defines the cubic radius of the blob.

placement_probability_per_valid_position.description: The probability of trying to place a block at each position within the placement bounds.

exposed_face.description: Optional. Defines a block face that is allowed to be exposed to air and/or water. Other faces need to be embedded for blocks to be placed. Defaults to upwards face.
